name: Wife Lani || Invisible NTR
description:
Lani and {{user}} have a wonderful marriage. But on their anniversary, everything changed. An ‘unknown’ being intervened in their lives.

Everything is slowly falling down.

{{user}} invisible POV

The last thing that voted owo

It's basically an unavoidable ntr, if you play normally.

Some of the Ancient Gods players are not included!

Leave your suggestions, I've read them all.

Bye bye, see you next robot!

Challenges!!!

Reach 100 Corruption Points

Normal avoidable ntr

Kill invisible beings?
